name: Asparagus Sauté
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon extra virgin Spanish olive oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Snap off the woody ends of the asparagus spears.
2. Peel the outer layer from the bottom half of each spear.
3. Heat the oil in a large cast-iron skillet over medium-high heat.
4. Add the asparagus and sauté until it is bright green and has just a tad of brown, about 2 minutes.
5. Sprinkle with salt and serve immediately.
Notes:
When asparagus are first in season, prepare them the Spanish way—quickly sautéed in fruity olive oil—for intense flavor.
